title: Swing Component Hierarchy & Event Handling Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the core hierarchy of Swing components and the flow of event-driven programming.
relationships: JComponent is the parent class for most Swing components
Top-Level Containers hold Intermediate Containers which hold Atomic Components
User interaction with an Atomic Component generates an Event
The Event is dispatched to a registered Event Listener
The Event Listener's Handler Method executes the application's response logic
